[xule.ruleDebug] Processing: DQC.US.0124.9588 - 11:59:05.520875 - D:\DJT\Documents\GitHub\davidtauriello\dqc_us_rules\tests\input\testfiles\2024-roll-2025\CHKP_instance_2024_2025.xml

[xule.ruleDebug] D:\DJT\Documents\GitHub\davidtauriello\dqc_us_rules\tests\input\testfiles\2024-roll-2025\CHKP_instance_2024_2025.xml - D:\DJT\Documents\GitHub\davidtauriello\dqc_us_rules\tests\input\testfiles\2024-roll-2025\CHKP_instance_2024_2025.xml

[DQC.US.0124.9588] The element us-gaap:OperatingLeaseRightOfUseAsset with a value of 27,100,000 has been used in the filing but does not appear in the financial statements of the filing. This disclosure should appear in the face financials unless it is included in another account caption. If this is the case either: 1. The element OperatingLeaseRightOfUseAssetStatementOfFinancialPositionExtensibleList should be used to identify the account where the Operating Lease Asset is included; or 2. The Balance Sheet location axis should be used with two or more account members to identify into which financial statement captions the Operating Lease Asset has been apportioned.

Rule Element Id:9588 Rule version: 29.0.2 - CHKP_instance_2024_2025.xml 18087

[DQC.US.0124.9588] The element us-gaap:OperatingLeaseRightOfUseAsset with a value of 21,500,000 has been used in the filing but does not appear in the financial statements of the filing. This disclosure should appear in the face financials unless it is included in another account caption. If this is the case either: 1. The element OperatingLeaseRightOfUseAssetStatementOfFinancialPositionExtensibleList should be used to identify the account where the Operating Lease Asset is included; or 2. The Balance Sheet location axis should be used with two or more account members to identify into which financial statement captions the Operating Lease Asset has been apportioned.
